entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.)

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The amount and distribution of genetic variation within and among peanut botanical varieties

entities.name: BOTANICAL VARIETIES
entities.description: Six distinct botanical varieties of peanut used for diversity assessment

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Continent of origin for peanut landraces

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Continent of origin for peanut landraces

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Continent of origin for peanut landraces

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat loci used as molecular markers for diversity assessments

entities.name: STMS
entities.description: Sequence-tagged microsatellite site primers used to identify SSR loci

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants revealed at the SSR loci

entities.name: FST
entities.description: Fixation index used to measure genetic differentiation between varieties and continents

entities.name: ROGERS MODIFIED DISTANCE
entities.description: A distance measure used to reveal similarity among peanut varieties

entities.name: SUBSPECIES FASTIGIATA
entities.description: A subspecies of peanut containing varieties fastigiata, vulgaris, and aequatoriana

entities.name: VAR FASTIGIATA
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut within subspecies fastigiata

entities.name: VAR VULGARIS
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut within subspecies fastigiata

entities.name: VAR AEQUATORIANA
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut within subspecies fastigiata

entities.name: VAR PERUVIANA
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut

entities.name: VAR HYPOGAEA
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut within subspecies hypogaea

entities.name: VAR HIRSUTA
entities.description: A botanical variety of peanut within subspecies hypogaea

entities.name: DISCRIMINANT FUNCTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to compare variety delimitation based on morphological and molecular characters

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL CHARACTERS
entities.description: Physical traits used for the delimitation of peanut varieties

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERS
entities.description: Genetic traits used for the delimitation of peanut varieties

entities.name: NEI'S UNBIASED ESTIMATE
entities.description: A method used to estimate gene diversity within botanical varieties

relationships.description: Study focuses on the genetic diversity of peanut
Peanut consists of several botanical varieties
Genetic diversity is assessed within and among varieties
SSR markers are used to assess genetic diversity
STMS primers are used to identify SSR loci
Used to reveal similarity among varieties
Used to analyze morphological characters for variety delimitation
Used to analyze molecular characters for variety delimitation
Used to estimate diversity within varieties
